headline: Assessing Keyera (TSX:KEY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Premium P/E Ratio
summary: How Keyera’s Recent Performance Frames the Stock Today Keyera (TSX:KEY) has attracted fresh attention after a strong past 3 months, during which the stock delivered a 24.20% total return, while the past month showed a 2.64% decline. For readers tracking shorter term moves, the shares were recently priced at CA$51.73, with a 0.37% gain over the latest trading day and a 3.13% decline over the past week.
